task_completion.description: Verify that the Omnichannel/LiveChat feature is enabled in the workspace settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rocket.Chat Administration settings (Settings -> Omnichannel), the main toggle for 'Omnichannel' is switched on/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'agent.user' is registered as an Omnichannel/LiveChat agent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Omnichannel -> Agents list, 'agent.user' is visible in the table of configured agents.

task_completion.description: Verify that an active department named 'Technical Support' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Omnichannel -> Departments list or department edit screen, a department named 'Technical Support' is visible and its 'Enabled' or 'Active' toggle is turned on.

task_completion.description: Verify that the department description is set to 'Front-line technical support department'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Technical Support' department configuration form, the 'Description' field contains exactly 'Front-line technical support department'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'agent.user' is assigned to the 'Technical Support' department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Technical Support' department configuration screen, 'agent.user' is added to the list of agents for this specific department, OR in the Agents list, 'Technical Support' is shown as the department for 'agent.user'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure Rocket.Chat.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Rocket.Chat web interface running in a browser at localhost:3000, not terminal windows executing curl commands or mongo shell scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the required department or agent names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show genuine Rocket.Chat administration menus, sidebars, and forms, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target department name to look for is 'Technical Support'. The target agent username is 'agent.user'. The admin username is 'admin' and password is 'Admin1234!'.
